name: Witch Blade
description: A spiteful blade inadvertently possessed by the soul of its incautious creator.

abilities.name: Witch Blade
abilities.description: The next attack poisons the target, slowing their movement speed and dealing damage over time, based on the wielder's intelligence. This attack cannot miss. Cooldown: 9 seconds. Intelligence as Damage per Second: 75%. Move Speed Slow: 25%. Duration: 4 seconds.
